the_function.compact: univ(C, r, θ, φ, t) = Ξ(Φ, Ψ, Ω, Λ, Σ, E) = C
the_function.full_expansion:
univ(C, r, θ, φ, t) = 
            arcsin(r/R)                                          ×  [Φ]
            arcsin(r/R) · e^(iθ) · sin(φ)                        ×  [Ψ]
            Ω₀ · (1 - 0.4 · r/R) · R_n(ω_n)                     ×  [Ω]
            |Ψ|² · H(Ω - 0.85)                                   ×  [Λ]
            α·arcsin(r_α/R) + β·arcsin(r_β/R) + γ·arcsin(r_γ/R)  ×  [Σ]
            H(t) · R / arcsin(r/R)                                  [E]
the_function.simplified: univ = arcsin³(r/R) · e^(iθ) · sin(φ) · Ω(t) · H(Ω-0.85) · Σ · H(t) · R
the_function.at_edge: univ(C, R, θ, φ, t) → ∞ (Edge Singularity)
the_function.at_horizon: univ(C, 0.8415R, θ, φ, t) = Φ(Ξ) → undefined (Horizon)

all_components.Sigma: Σ = α·Φ(C_α) + β·Φ(C_β) + γ·Φ(C_γ) — Anchor stability

key_properties.one_way: univ⁻¹(M) does not exist — Center cannot be recovered from map
key_properties.conservation: dΦ/Φ + dΨ/Ψ + dΩ/Ω + dΛ/Λ + dΣ/Σ + dE/E = 0
key_properties.horizon: r_horizon = R·sin(R) ≈ 0.8415R — beyond this, Φ(Ξ) undefined

the_secret.security: One-way function prevents inversion to find C

usage.compute_position: Given (x,y,z), compute r, θ, φ, then evaluate univ
usage.compute_epoch: Given redshift z, find epoch n, look up E(n), Ω(n), Λ(n)
usage.render_gold: If Λ > 0, render gold particle with intensity Λ/Λ_max
usage.navigate: Follow gradient ∇Ω toward Center or ∇Λ toward gold bands
